title: Crazy theory Kaworu shot Kaji
wikitext:
[]: Crazy theory Kaworu shot Kaji             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed Oct 19, 2011 2:36 pm I could not find a who shot Kaji thread in the first couple of pages so I made this. Now there is no real proof that Kaworu shot Kaji but the idea makes sense to me. For all we know Kaji and Kaworu could have known each other and Kaji would not have expected the sweet and innocent looking Kaworu to be packing heat. So it is a plausible theory in my opinion but there is no real proof to back it up. So what are other people’s opinions on this crazy theory?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Oct 19, 2011 3:05 pm There's more threads that should be linked in a single post about who killed Kaji. There's these 2 "Search" and "Threads" links at the navbar of the forum. Clicking on "Threads" takes you here: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread_lists/Evangelion_Discussion__threads.html Doing a page search for "Killed Kaji" will give you at least a dozen, some within the last 2 months. Clicking on the "Search" link takes you to an embedded Google custom search. Downside here is you're looking for posts instead of threads with the search function. That said, you may notice 90% of all the "Who Killed Kaji" threads are locked. It's sort of a weird subject that gets sort of meta because we've already been told by the staff (and Anno) specifically that it wasn't a character in the cast and was a random henchman for Nerv/Seele.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed Oct 19, 2011 3:13 pm ^ Oh I have not heard of that before (random henchman does make a lot of sense) And thanks on the information on how to search ( I am such a noob to the internet)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 19, 2011 3:21 pm Would someone care to point out the citation for the "random third party" statement that we refer to all of the time? Better yet, add the citation to the wiki. It really needs to be on there: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Kaji The best I can do is this: http://www.gwern.net/otaku#fn50 ’However, the Newtype filmbook Vol. 8, P. 38 Check Point (at the bottom of the page) states as follows: “Immediately after the airing of this episode (No. 21), there was some debate as to who actually killed Kaji. While some people believe it to have been Misato, Series Director Anno has said that it was a third party working either for SEELE or for NERV’s Intelligence Division.”’

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Oct 19, 2011 3:41 pm http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/oldeva/1998-April/012739.html http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=454429#454429

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 19, 2011 3:51 pm Well then, it sounds like Anno is just saying "You know, it could have been a random goon...". He's not saying it is, just that it could. So technically, it could have been anyone.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Oct 19, 2011 4:33 pm And in the second link it says: "He was tricked by one of his informants and then killed. It wasn't Misato or Ritsuko." Unless you have a strong case that another character from the cast was Kaji's informant, it's not one of them.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Oct 19, 2011 5:09 pm Point: Kaworu kills kittens Point: "So, that cat died" KAWORU SHOT Kaji, PROOF

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Wed Oct 19, 2011 10:11 pm You know...pretty much everybody has a motive to kill Kaji. So let's just take this to it's logical conclusion and say Pen-Pen killed Kaji in a jealous fit of rage over Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Oct 20, 2011 11:57 am Kaworu did it so that no one would resemble their physical and genetic resemblance. Kaworu failed to take into account Misato. When she confronted him he screeched like The Thing and his head split open and he started absorbing everyone and... Well okay that didn't happen but someone should write that fanfic.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Oct 20, 2011 12:36 pm A fanfic where Kaworu becomes some kind of gibbering Thing/Xenomorph-like monstrosity could be excellent, it's totally within in his power too. Kind of hope that the issue of Kaworu basically being the meat puppet of an elder god comes up in Rebuild, now, actually.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Oct 20, 2011 12:55 pm I still believe it's Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Oct 20, 2011 1:16 pm If we're talking OA versions, I'm with you.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Oct 21, 2011 1:36 pm Azathoth wrote: A fanfic where Kaworu becomes some kind of gibbering Thing/Xenomorph-like monstrosity could be excellent, it's totally within in his power too. Kind of hope that the issue of Kaworu basically being the meat puppet of an elder god comes up in Rebuild, now, actually.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Oct 21, 2011 5:52 pm it was one of kaworu's clones.

[]:             Quote Post by Korgan » Sat Oct 22, 2011 4:57 am Kaji was really assassinated by the watermelons he was growing; they had finally had enough of his sadistic and abusive treatment of them, mutated into a horrible Angel-like being and shot him, using an ordinary pistol to implicate a human.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Oct 22, 2011 5:05 am Korgan wrote: Kaji was really assassinated by the watermelons he was growing; they had finally had enough of his sadistic and abusive treatment of them, mutated into a horrible Angel-like being and shot him, using an ordinary pistol to implicate a human.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Oct 22, 2011 6:20 am Ornette wrote: And in the second link it says: "He was tricked by one of his informants and then killed. It wasn't Misato or Ritsuko." Unless you have a strong case that another character from the cast was Kaji's informant, it's not one of them.

[]: Poor Poor geek. B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Oct 22, 2011 7:49 am I'm extending Sachi's brilliant theory a little for this. As I see it, it went down one of two ways, out of jealously, or because he's a spaz. Kaji : " Hello there. " Makoto : BANG! " Oh sh*t, you surprised m— Kaji? Kaji are you okay?... Ah Goddamit ... Now I'll never get that sex tape." Hmm, maybe if I traded information with Misato instead...

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Sat Oct 22, 2011 8:09 am Has no one here looked at my signature? Kaji was killed by future-Kaji with an eyepatch. Seriously.
